repair_moon-formation_R1_2.text:
atomik 0.3
scene moon_formation
claim "The Moon formed from debris following a collision between Earth and a Mars-sized body." [status reported]
subject [[Giant-impact hypothesis]]
node impact "Mars-sized body impact" [role process]
node debris "Debris ejection" [role process]
node moon "Moon formation" [role terminal]
node core "Small iron core" [role evidence]
node iso "Isotopic similarity" [role evidence]
node anomaly "Isotopic composition challenges" [role contradiction]
relation impact -> debris [as inference]
relation debris -> moon [as inference]
relation impact -> core [as inference] [label "explains"]
relation impact -> iso [as inference] [label "explains"]
relation anomaly -> claim [as refutation] [sign -]
project as flow [suggested]

repair_carte-cycle-carbone_R1_4.text:
atomik 0.3
scene carbon_cycle
claim "Le cycle du carbone relie l'atmosphère, les océans et la biosphère par des processus d'échange dynamiques." [status established]
subject [[Cycle du carbone]]
node atmos "Atmosphère"
node ocean "Océans"
node bio "Biosphère"
node photo "Photosynthèse"
node resp "Respiration et décomposition"
node dissol "Dissolution océanique"
node temp "Réchauffement"
group loop_balance "Boucles de rétroaction" [kind loop]
relation photo -> atmos [as fact] [sign -] [label "réduit le CO2"]
relation resp -> atmos [as fact] [sign +] [label "augmente le CO2"]
relation dissol -> ocean [as fact] [sign +] [label "absorption"]
relation temp -> dissol [as inference] [sign -] [label "réduit capacité"]
relation temp -> atmos [as inference] [sign +] [label "renforce accumulation"]
place atmos at 0,0
place photo below atmos
place resp below atmos
place dissol below ocean
project as cycle [suggested]

repair_vaccination-meprise_R1_4.text:
atomik 0.3
scene immunite_vaccins
claim "Les vaccins ne surchargent pas le système immunitaire des nourrissons." [status established]
subject [[Système immunitaire]]
input pred = choice "Oui, ils saturent" | "Non, ils sont négligeables" [label "Le vaccin surcharge-t-il le système immunitaire ?"]
node idee_reçue "Les vaccins surchargent le système immunitaire" [status misconception]
node realite "Charge antigénique quotidienne > Calendrier vaccinal" [role evidence]
node etudes "Études de sécurité à grande échelle" [role evidence]
relation realite -> idee_reçue refutes [as refutation]
relation etudes -> idee_reçue refutes [as refutation]
step 1 reveal idee_reçue
step 2 require pred
step 3 reveal realite
step 3 reveal etudes
step 3 highlight realite
project as graph [suggested]

repair_antibiotic-resistance_R1_2.text:
atomik 0.3
scene antibiotic_resistance_teaching
claim "Antibiotic resistance is a property of bacterial populations, not the human body." [status established]
subject [[Antibiotic resistance]]
group mechanisms "The Selection Process" [kind cluster]
node misconception "My body becomes resistant to antibiotics" [status misconception]
node kill "Antibiotics kill susceptible bacteria" [in mechanisms]
node survival "Resistant bacteria survive and multiply" [in mechanisms]
node selection "Natural selection occurs at the population level" [in mechanisms] [status established]
node pop_change "Resistant strain dominates" [in mechanisms]
evidence mechanism_evidence "Study of bacterial evolution" [source "Scientific consensus"]
relation kill -> survival [as inference]
relation survival -> pop_change [as inference]
relation selection -> pop_change [as fact]
relation selection -> "Natural selection" [as analogy]
relation mechanism_evidence -> misconception refutes [as refutation]
input prediction = choice "The body gets immune" | "The bacteria change" [label "How does antibiotic resistance happen?"]
step 1 reveal misconception
step 2 require prediction
step 3 reveal kill
step 4 reveal survival
step 5 reveal pop_change
step 6 reveal selection
step 6 highlight selection
